name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the Maximo Local Dev Mode extension
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

## 🔍 Before you submit

Please search [existing issues](https://github.com/ibm-mas/maf-local-dev-mode/issues) to check whether your feature has already been requested.

---

## ⚠️ Known Limitations

Please note these are current known limitations — feature requests related to these are already on our radar:

- **MAS 9.2 Patch 1+ only** — no support for earlier versions
- **No MAS 9.1 support** — MAS 9.1 is not supported
- **Cannot create or clone applications** — use the MAF Tool to clone applications for now

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. e.g. _I'm always frustrated when..._

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
